qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg oi_acto_inseg, ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.c_acto_inseg c_acto_inseg, ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.d_acto_inseg d_acto_inseg FROM ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG ORDER BY ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.ActosInseguros.ACTO_INSEG\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg oi_acto_inseg FROM ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG ORDER BY ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.ActosInseguros.ACTO_INSEG\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.ActosInseguros.ACTO_INSEG.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.ActosInseguros.ACTO_INSEG.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg) as CNT from ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.oi_acto_inseg={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.d_acto_inseg,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC02_ACTOS_INSEG.c_acto_inseg,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
